get.summary: List of jobs active for the current user identified by the key.
get.description:
It will return the list of jobs for the given user. In order to get the jobs a key or token must be provided:
  - If the user key is provided all jobs for the current will be return.
  - If one token is provided it will return the job assigned to that token if any.

The request is paginated with an amount of 50 elements per page in any case.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter the status of the job.

parameters.description: Token for authentication for the current job

parameters.description: Api key for the user to filter.

parameters.description: Pagination for list of elements.

401.description: No API key or invalid API key given.

get.summary: Get a list of the valid statuses.
get.description: The endpoint provide a list of all available status that the Job may have during the process as a description of the status.

get.summary: Get a list of the valid conversions.
get.description:
Gets a list of the valid conversions that can be made with the API. For each conversion is also shown the available options for that specific type of conversion.

This conversions can be added to a Job through the specific endpoint or in the information given to create the new Job.

parameters.description: Category for the conversion.

parameters.description: Target for for the conversion.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination for list of elements.

parameters.name: x-oc-api-key
parameters.description: Api key for the user to filter.

204.description: Empty answer if there are no active contracts

401.description: Invalid credentials

get.summary: Get the statistics data for a specific day
get.description: The endpoint provides the statistics data for a specific day

parameters.name: x-oc-api-key
parameters.description: Api key for the user to filter.

parameters.name: day
parameters.description: It must be in the format yyyy-mm-dd

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Allows to filter the statistics data for all or a single API key

200.description: Returns statistics data for the requested day

401.description: Invalid credentials

get.summary: Get the statistics data for a specific month
get.description: The endpoint provides the statistics data for a specific month

parameters.description: Api key for the user to filter.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: It must be in the format yyyy-mm

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Allows to filter the statistics data for all or a single API key

200.description: Returns statistics data for the requested month

401.description: Invalid credentials

get.summary: Get the statistics data for a specific year

OutputFilePatch.description: Content of the output to patch.

token.description: Token to identify client allowed to run the job.

errors.description: Errors that happens in downloads or conversions

warnings.description: Warnings that happens in downloads or conversions

process.description: Determine if the job must be processed as soon as it is ready.

fail_on_input_error.description: Determine if the job should fail or not in case of at least one input cannot be downloaded

fail_on_conversion_error.description: Determine if the job should fail or not in case of at least one conversion fails

conversion.description: Type of conversion or conversions to be carried out.

limits.description: Limits to apply to the job

input.description: Source or sources of the files to be converted.

output.description: Output or Outputs of the conversion.

callback.description: Callback url to the the status updates

notify_status.description: If set to true, a callback will be sent for each job status change

server.description: Server assigned for file uploads and downloads

spent.description: Credits spent to complete the job

created_at.description: Date and time when the job was created.

modified_at.description: Date and time when the job was last modified.

download_passwords.description: Array of download passwords for the job. Any password in the list grants download access to all outputs of this job. Send the full list via PATCH to add, remove, or rotate passwords.

type.description: How the file has been generated.

source.description: The source of the file to be used that can be either, an external url, an identifier for an uploaded file to the server, an identifier for another input or the cloud storage (e.g. amazons3).

engine.description: The remote download engine to use. E.g., if a remote web page contains an embedded video to download, use "video". If you need the full HTML page, use "website". If you need a screenshot, use "screenshot".

options.description: Options to modify the default downloading behaviour

size.description: Size of the file in bytes.

hash.description: (deprecated, use checksum instead) File hash for content verification

content_type.description: Content type for file conversion definition

created_at.description: Date and time when the job was created.

modified_at.description: Date and time when the job was last modified.

credentials.description: Credentials needed to download or decrypt the input file.

parameters.description: Any extra parameter that is specified in the documentation, if not recognized, it will be ignored.

metadata.description: Might contain useful metadata for some file formats.

options.description: The options to patch or to add to the input file.

source.description: Sources for the files including the input files and conversion used.

filename.description: The file name of the converted file.

size.description: Size of the file in bytes.

status.description: Status of the output, when disabled the file will not be able to download.

content_type.description: The mime type of the output file.

downloads_counter.description: Number of times the output has been downloaded.

created_at.description: Date and time when the job was created.

metadata.description: Might contain useful metadata for some file formats.

filename.description: The desired file name of the converted file WITHOUT the file extension.

target.description: Identifier for the job conversion type.

options.description: Type of conversion to perform with the file.

target.description: Identifier for the job conversion type.

options.description: Type of conversion to perform with the file.

target.description: Identifier for the preset conversion type.

options.description: The options set in the preset. Only available for private presets.

target.description: Identifier for the preset conversion type.

options.description: The options you want to set in the preset.

target.description: The target type for the preset.

options.description: The options set in the preset. Only available for private presets.

exec_time.description: Execution time for the thread in seconds

created_at.description: Date and time when the job was created.

modified_at.description: Date and time when the job was last modified.

created_at.description: Date and time when the job was created.

source.description: The source of the error in the Job definition. Can be one of "input" or "conversion"

id_source.description: The unique identifier of the source

message.example: The file could not be downloaded by our servers. Please verify the link you have provided.

source.description: The source of the warning in the Job definition. Can be one of "input" or "conversion"

id_source.description: The unique identifier of the source

message.example: Impossible to write metadata inside the file

credentials.description: The password needed to open the protected file

parameters.description: Additional parameters for the input file

example.description: Type of conversion to perform with the file.
